name: Seedance Video Generator
description: AI video generation powered by Volcengine Seedance — supports text-to-video, image-to-video, multimodal, editing, extension, and long video stitching.

description_i18n.zh: 基于火山引擎 Seedance 的 AI 视频生成 — 支持文生视频、图生视频、多模态、视频编辑、视频续写、长视频拼接。
description_i18n.en: AI video generation powered by Volcengine Seedance — supports text-to-video, image-to-video, multimodal, editing, extension, and long video stitching.

author: OpenAkita
